logline: A teenage gamer trapped inside a dead multiplayer world searches for missing players, only to uncover signs that he may already be a ghost or copy inside the machine.

core_premise.surface_story: Leo explores abandoned servers, corrupted maps, ghost lobbies, and hidden admin spaces searching for survivors and a way out.
core_premise.deep_mystery: The deeper Leo goes, the more evidence suggests he may not be the original Leo, but a lingering backup, echo, or digital ghost.
core_premise.tone: mysterious, emotional, eerie, internet-native, PG-13 suspense
core_premise.format: 30-40 second vertical mini-stories with cliffhangers and audience votes

character_bible.name: Last Player Leo
character_bible.look: Slim teenage gamer with short messy dark brown hair, pale skin, oval face, tired eyes, charcoal hoodie, and glowing amber-ring headset.
character_bible.signature_palette: teal-blue shadows, cyan screenlight, warm orange headset glow
character_bible.personality: curious, lonely, brave under pressure, emotionally vulnerable, obsessive when chasing clues
visual_rules: Keep Leo's age consistent as a teenage boy
Keep hoodie dark charcoal or deep blue-gray
Keep headset large with circular orange light ring
Use cool blue lighting with a warm orange accent
Do not turn Leo into a different art style from scene to scene

world_rules: The game world is abandoned but not empty
Old player activity survives as echoes, loops, glitches, or memory ghosts
Admin areas and hidden systems reveal the truth behind the collapse
The server behaves like it wants Leo to keep exploring
Each episode should reveal one new clue and end with a question or cliffhanger

season_one.title: The Last Player
season_one.hook: Leo realizes the server is empty except for one impossible message.
season_one.reveal: A message appears from a player who should no longer exist.

season_one.title: The Ghost Lobby
season_one.hook: Leo sees player silhouettes repeating old movements in the main lobby.
season_one.reveal: One ghost loop breaks and looks directly at him.
season_one.cliffhanger: The figure follows Leo into the next area.

season_one.title: The Save File
season_one.hook: Leo enters an archive room and finds his own save slot.
season_one.reveal: The save file is marked deleted.
season_one.cliffhanger: A backup file with his name is still active.

season_one.title: The Voice In Chat
season_one.hook: Global chat suddenly comes back online.
season_one.reveal: A user named Leo_Original answers before Leo can type.
season_one.cliffhanger: The account says, "I know how you died."

season_one.title: The No-Exit Door
season_one.hook: Leo finally reaches the logout gate.
season_one.reveal: The system rejects him as an unrecognized user.

season_one.title: The Backup Room
season_one.hook: Leo discovers hidden pods storing fragments of vanished players.
season_one.reveal: One pod contains his real-world name.
season_one.cliffhanger: The pod status changes from dormant to restoring.

season_one.title: The First To Vanish
season_one.hook: Leo unlocks a buried incident log.
season_one.reveal: He was the first player lost in the collapse, not the last.
season_one.cliffhanger: The world was rebuilt around his disappearance.

season_one.title: Am I The Real Leo?
season_one.hook: Leo meets the echo claiming to be the original.
season_one.reveal: One Leo is the trapped human mind and the other is the stable digital survivor.
season_one.cliffhanger: Only one of them can leave the server.

audience_vote_templates: Should Leo follow the signal or run?
Should Leo trust the ghost in chat?
Should Leo open the backup room?
Who do you think is the real Leo?
